## **2.2.2.B. PI #2**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Italian ANSPs not involved in the process of storing and subsequently processing the flight trajectory information/data and therefore in defining the output of this PI.

As with the KEP (PI\_#1), this PI is in charge of the NM of Eurocontrol, which handles its complete processing and, considering the methodology in force, provides the output using its own algorithm.
